changeSet.author: hivearmor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hive_compliance_standard WHERE standard_name = 'SOC 2 Type II'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hive_compliance_standard (standard_name, standard_description, system_owner) VALUES ( 'SOC 2 Type II', 'AICPA Trust Services Criteria for security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy. Type II evaluates operating effectiveness over a period.', true )

INSERT INTO hive_compliance_standard_section (standard_id, standard_section_name, standard_section_description) SELECT s.id, v.name, v.descr FROM hive_compliance_standard s CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('CC1 - Control Environment', 'Demonstrates commitment to integrity, ethical values, and competence. Includes board oversight, organizational structure, and accountability.'), ('CC2 - Communication and Information', 'Generates and uses relevant, quality information to support internal controls. Covers internal and external communication of information relevant to objectives.'), ('CC3 - Risk Assessment', 'Specifies suitable objectives to enable identification and assessment of risks. Identifies and analyzes risks to achieve objectives, including fraud risks.'), ('CC4 - Monitoring Activities', 'Selects, develops, and performs ongoing and separate evaluations to ascertain control components are present and functioning.'), ('CC5 - Control Activities', 'Selects and develops control activities that contribute to mitigating risks. Deploys control activities through policies and procedures.'), ('CC6 - Logical and Physical Access Controls', 'Implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architecture. Manages access credentials, removes access, prevents unauthorized access, and restricts privileged access.'), ('CC7 - System Operations', 'Detects and monitors for security events and anomalies. Responds to identified security incidents, evaluates security events, and communicates breaches.'), ('CC8 - Change Management', 'Authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures.'), ('CC9 - Risk Mitigation', 'Identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities including contingency and business continuity planning. Manages vendor and business partner risk.') ) AS v(name, descr) WHERE s.standard_name = 'SOC 2 Type II'
